source: aced.gg dev blog 2021-04-01 (Ra fight, patpot) + 2021-04-11 (Sia & Hu) + 2021-01-02 (biome) — DOCUMENTED, no live footage
map: RotF's interpretation of the EGYPTIAN AFTERLIFE (the Duat). Travel by the 'Duat boat' from the SUN DOCKS through the dungeon. Lore: help OSIRIS save the Duat from falling into chaos. Battle mini-bosses and Gods.

bosses.name: Ra, the Sun God
phases: P1: manic bullet-hell — DESTROY Ra's STAVES first (staves have health-scaling; skipping them makes later phases much harder)
P2: 'channels the power of the sun'
attacks: Sun Disk attack (telegraphed, rewards precise dodging — not high-threat)

bosses.name: Sia and Hu (Eternal Companions)
bosses.note: A paired mini-boss/god encounter (separate 2021-04-11 post — detail in docs/aced-blog/gate-underworld-sia-hu.txt).

bosses.name: Osiris
bosses.note: Quest-giver/god NPC whose plan to save the Duat drives the dungeon.

mechanics: DOCUMENTED (dev blog): Gate to the Underworld is a HARD-rank Egyptian-afterlife dungeon. Ra fight = staves-first bullet-hell (destroy staves or health-scaling makes phases brutal), then sun-channel + sky phases, with Sun Disk + Sun Laser attacks. RotF REWORKED THE HITBOX SYSTEM to bullet-hell-style (tighter, smoother dodging) — relevant engine note. After Ra, the Duat boat continues past the Sun Docks to Sia & Hu and beyond. Legacy ROTF detail mentioned: the 'Icy Peaks' realm area was guarded by an Aztec-themed creature.
uncertain: Exact bullet patterns/timings, drops, taunts, and full boss list (beyond Ra/Sia&Hu/Osiris) not fully specified. See docs/aced-blog/gate-underworld-*.txt for raw text. No video footage exists (verified).
confidence: MEDIUM-HIGH for theme + Ra phase structure + mechanics (DOCUMENTED from dev blog); LOW for exact patterns/drops. Reconstruction-grade.
